name: ruflo

readme_excerpt: Orchestrate 100+ specialized AI agents across machines, teams, and trust boundaries. Ruflo adds coordinated swarms, self-learning memory, federated comms, and enterprise security to Claude Code — so agents don't just run, they collaborate.

name: DeepSeek-TUI
description: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal
readme_excerpt: deepseek is distributed as Rust binaries: the dispatcher command (deepseek) and the companion TUI runtime (deepseek-tui). Pick whichever install path you already use; they all put the same commands on your PATH. The npm package is an installer/wrapper for the release binaries, not the agent runtime itself.

name: TradingAgents
description: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework
readme_excerpt: - [2026-04] **TradingAgents v0.2.4** released with structured-output agents (Research Manager, Trader, Portfolio Manager), LangGraph checkpoint resume, persistent decision log, DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM/Azure provider support, Docker, and a Windows UTF-8 encoding fix. See CHANGELOG.md for the full list. - [2026-03] **TradingAgents v0.2.3** released with multi-language support, GPT-5.4 family models, unified model catalog, backtesting date fidelity, and proxy support. - [2026-03] **TradingAgents v0.2.2**…

name: dexter
description: An autonomous agent for deep financial research
readme_excerpt: Dexter is an autonomous financial research agent that thinks, plans, and learns as it works. It performs analysis using task planning, self-reflection, and real-time market data. Think Claude Code, but built specifically for financial research.

name: 9router
description: Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.
readme_excerpt: **Never stop coding. Save 20-40% tokens with RTK + auto-fallback to FREE & cheap AI models.**

name: maigret
description: 🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites
readme_excerpt: **Maigret** collects a dossier on a person **by username only**, checking for accounts on a huge number of sites and gathering all the available information from web pages. No API keys required.

name: CloakBrowser
description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.
readme_excerpt: Not a patched config. Not a JS injection. A real Chromium binary with fingerprints modified at the C++ source level. Antibot systems score it as a normal browser — because it is a normal browser.

name: skills
description: Claude Agent SDK with a web browsing tool
readme_excerpt: A set of skills for enabling **Claude Code** to work with Browserbase through browser automation and the official bb CLI.

name: aidlc-workflows
description: AI-Driven Life Cycle (AI-DLC) adaptive workflow steering rules for AI coding agents
readme_excerpt: AI-DLC is an intelligent software development workflow that adapts to your needs, maintains quality standards, and keeps you in control of the process. For learning more about AI-DLC Methodology, read this blog and the Method Definition Paper referred in it.

name: docuseal
description: Open source DocuSign alternative. Create, fill, and sign digital documents ✍️
readme_excerpt: DocuSeal is an open source platform that provides secure and efficient digital document signing and processing. Create PDF forms to have them filled and signed online on any device with an easy-to-use, mobile-optimized web tool.
